somali.strong_acid_strong_base: Aashito xoog leh + Base xoog leh
somali.splash_proof_chemical_safety_goggles_n: Muraayadaha badbaadada kiimikaad ee ka hortagaya saydhitaanka, maaha muraayado caadi ah
somali.protects_skin_from_corrosive_acids_and: Waxay maqaarka ka ilaalisaa aashitooyinka iyo baseska nabarka geliya
somali.button_it_up_protects_clothing_and_ski: Badhanka ku xidho: waxay dharka iyo maqaarka ka ilaalisaa saydhitaanka
somali.no_sandals_or_open_toed_shoes_in_the_c: Ma jiraan dacas ama kabo faraha lugta furan gudaha shaybaadhka kiimikaad
somali.eyewash_station_located: Xarunta dhaqista isha waa la helay
somali.know_where_it_is_before_you_start_you_: Ogow meesha ay ku taal ka hor inta aadan bilaabin: waxaad haysataa 10 ilbiriqsi haddii lagugu saydho
somali.acetic_acid_is_flammable_know_your_nea: Aashitada acetic way ololi kartaa: ogow dab-demiskaaga ugu dhow
somali.sds_reviewed_for_chemicals: Warqadda macluumaadka badbaadada (SDS) ayaa dib loo eegay kiimikooyinka
somali.safety_data_sheets_list_all_hazards_pp: Warqadaha macluumaadka badbaadada waxay liistaa dhammaan khataraha, qalabka ilaalinta, iyo hababka degdegga ah
somali.always_add_titrant_slowly_near_the_exp: Had iyo jeer si tartiib ah ugu dar titrant meesha dhibcaha dhammaadka la filayo. Hal dhibic waxay si weyn u beddeli kartaa pH!
somali.the_ph_is_changing_rapidly_in_a_real_l: pH si degdeg ah ayuu u beddelayaa! Shaybaadhka dhabta ah, u beddel ku darista dhibic-dhibic oo ruq gadaal mid kasta oo dhibic ah.
somali.you_overshot_the_equivalence_point_in_: Waad dhaaftay dhibcaha sinnaanta! Shaybaadhka dhabta ah, waa inaad dib ugu bilowdaa muunad cusub.
somali.good_lab_practice_always_rinse_the_bur: Ku dhaqanka shaybaadhka wanaagsan: marka hore ku dhaq biuret biyo la miiray, ka dibna xalka titrant ka hor inta aadan dib u buuxin.
somali.at_the_half_equivalence_point_ph_pka_t: Dhibcaha kala-badhka sinnaanta pH = pKa. Kani waa bartamaha aagga buffer!
somali.kmno_is_a_strong_oxidizer_in_a_real_la: KMnO₄ waa oxidizer xoog leh! Shaybaadhka dhabta ah, ka fogee dareerayaasha organic-ga oo isticmaal fume hood. Guduudan → midab la'aan = dhibcaha dhammaadka.
somali.polyprotic_acids_have_multiple_equival: Aashitooyinka polyprotic waxay leeyihiin dhibcaha sinnaan oo badan! Fiiri sida qalooca S u simmo inta u dhaxaysa dhibic kasta (aagagga buffer).
somali.in_a_back_titration_you_add_excess_aci: Titration dib, waxaad marka hore ku dartaa aashito xad-dhaaf ah, ka dibna titration u sameysaa aashitada hadhay. Waxay u shaqeysaa analytes aan milmi karin sida CaCO₃.
somali.never_add_water_to_concentrated_acid_a: Waligaa biyo ha ku darin aashito xoogan! Had iyo jeer ku dar aashitada biyaha. «Si sax ah u samee: aashitada biyaha.» Falcelinta kulaylka sii deynaysa waxay keeni kartaa saydhitaan khatar ah.
somali.when_using_volatile_reagents_like_nh_o: Marka aad isticmaalayso reagents dhalaalaya sida NH₃ ama HCl (xoogan), had iyo jeer ka shaqee hoosta fume hood. Neefsashada uumiga aashitada/baseska waxay burburisaa unugyada sambabada.
somali.read_the_burette_at_the_bottom_of_the_: Akhri biuret dhinaca hoose ee meniscus, isha oo aad ku hayso heerka dusha dareeraha. Qaladka parallax wuxuu saameeyaa saxnaanta!
somali.while_pouring_hcl_some_splashes_on_you: Marka aad shubaayso HCl, qaar baa ku saydha gacantaada.
somali.remove_clothing_rinse_under_running_wa: Dhar ka qaad, ku dhaq biyo socda 15+ daqiiqo
somali.correct_immediate_and_prolonged_rinsin: Sax! Dhaqista degdega ah iyo mid dheer waa muhiim aad u weyn. 15 daqiiqo waxay ka hortagaan burburka unugyada.
somali.wrong_wiping_can_spread_the_acid_and_p: Qalad! Masaxaadda waxay fidin kartaa aashitada oo ku riixi kartaa maqaarkaaga. Waxaad u baahan tahay biyo socda degdeg ah.
somali.apply_baking_soda_paste_directly_to_sk: Ku mari baste baking soda toos maqaarka
somali.not_recommended_the_neutralization_rea: Lama talin! Falcelinta dhexdhexaadinta waxay soo saartaa kulayl (kulayl sii deyn) kaas oo sii dari kara gubashada. Biyo had iyo jeer waa jawaabta koowaad.
somali.it_s_dilute_just_keep_working: Way khafiif tahay, kaliya sii wad shaqada
somali.dangerous_even_dilute_acids_can_cause_: Khatar! Xitaa aashitooyinka khafiifka ah waxay keeni karaan gubasho waqti ka dib. Had iyo jeer si degdeg ah u maareey xiriirka kiimikaad.
somali.naoh_solution_splashes_into_your_eyes_: Marka aad ruqaynayso, xalka NaOH wuxuu ku saydha indhahaaga.
somali.go_to_eyewash_station_immediately_rins: Aad xarunta dhaqista isha isla markiiba, dhaq 15+ daqiiqo, indhaha furan hayso
somali.correct_speed_is_everything_you_have_a: Sax! Xawaaraha waa wax walba: waxaad haysataa qiyaastii 10 ilbiriqsi ka hor inta uusan bilaaban dhaawaca daran. Indhaha furan hayso oo madaxaaga u leexi si aad uga hortagto wasakhda in ay ku faaftaan isha kale.
somali.rub_your_eyes_and_blink_rapidly: Xoqo indhahaaga oo si degdeg ah u il-jebi
somali.never_rub_this_spreads_the_chemical_ac: Waligaa ha xoqin! Tani waxay ku fidisaa kiimikaadka dusha isha oo balaadhan waxayna xoqi kartaa cornea.
somali.use_eye_drops_from_the_first_aid_kit: Isticmaal dhibcaha isha ee ka mid ah boorsada gargaarka koowaad
somali.eye_drops_are_insufficient_you_need_hi: Dhibcaha isha kuma filna! Waxaad u baahan tahay dhaqid xad badan 15+ daqiiqo. Dhibcaha isha ma bixin karaan taas.
somali.finish_the_experiment_first_then_wash: Marka hore dhammee tijaabada, ka dibna dhaq
somali.extremely_dangerous_naoh_causes_alkali: Khatar aad u weyn! NaOH wuxuu keenaa gubasho alkali oo si qoto dheer u gasha waqti ka dib. Ilbiriqsi kasta waa muhiim. Dhaawaca isha ee kiimikaad waa sababta #1 ee indho-la'aanta shaybaadhka.
somali.large_acid_spill_on_bench: Daadin weyn oo aashito ah miiska!
somali.you_knock_over_the_beaker_of_0_1m_hcl_: Waxaad ridday beaker 0.1M HCl ah, oo daadiyay qiyaastii 200 ml miiska.
somali.alert_others_contain_with_absorbent_ne: Uga digo dadka kale, ku xakameey nuugid, ku dhexdhexaadi NaHCO₃, ku nadiifi biyo
somali.perfect_procedure_1_alert_nearby_stude: Habka kaamil ah! (1) Uga digo ardayda u dhow (2) Ku xakameey faafitaanka nuugid (3) Ku shub sodium bicarbonate si aad u dhexdhexaadiso (4) Ku nadiifi biyo (5) Si sax ah u tuur.
somali.partially_right_but_incomplete_floodin: Qayb ahaan sax laakiin dhammaystiran maaha. Daadinta waxay sii fidisaa aashitada mana dhexdhexaadiso. Marka hore xakameey, ka dibna dhexdhexaadi, ka dibna dhaq.
somali.tell_the_teacher_and_don_t_touch_it: U sheeg macallinka oo ha taaban
somali.telling_the_teacher_is_good_but_at_0_1: U sheegista macallinka way fiican tahay laakiin 0.1M waa la xakamayn karaa. Waa inaad isla markiiba bilowdaa xakamaynta halka qof uu uga digayo macallinka. Ha u ogolaan inay gaadho geeska miiska.
somali.paper_towels_are_not_appropriate_for_a: Tuwaallada warqadda kuma habboona daadinta aashitada! Ma dhexdhexaadiyaan aashitada waxaadna maareyn doontaa alaab aashito la qooyay. Isticmaal boorsada daadinta ee habboon.
somali.while_working_with_ammonia_nh_you_noti: Marka aad la shaqaynayso ammonia (NH₃), waxaad dareemaysaa ur qadhaadh indhahaaguna waxay bilaabaan inay ilmeeyaan.
somali.move_the_experiment_to_the_fume_hood_i: U guuri tijaabada fume hood isla markiiba, hawada u fur aagga
somali.correct_volatile_chemicals_like_nh_mus: Sax! Kiimikooyinka dhalaalaya sida NH₃ waa in lagu maareeyo hoosta fume hood. Haddii aad urin karto, waad neefsanaysaa. Fur daaqadaha oo u bax hawo saafi ah haddii hood-ku uu fog yahay.
somali.put_on_a_face_mask_and_continue: Xidho maaskaro wejiga oo sii wad
somali.a_regular_face_mask_does_not_protect_a: Maaskaro wejiga caadiga ah kaama ilaaliso uumiga kiimikaad! Waxaad u baahan tahay ilaalin neefsashada oo habboon (kuma jiraan shaybaadhyada dugsiga badankood) ama fume hood.
somali.fan_the_fumes_away_with_your_hand: Gacantaada ku ruq uumiga si uu u tago
somali.fanning_is_for_wafting_to_detect_odors: Ruqaynta waa loogu talagalay soo qaadista hawada si tartiib ah si loo ogaado urta (hawada si tartiib ah sanka loogu keeno). Kama saarto uumiga khatarta ah aagga. Waxaad u baahan tahay hawo-mareen!
somali.it_s_just_a_little_smell_keep_going: Waa uun ur yar, sii wad
somali.dangerous_if_you_can_smell_nh_the_conc: Khatar! Haddii aad urin karto NH₃, tirada waxay dhaafi kartaa xadka badbaadada leh (25 ppm). Xiriirka muddada dheer wuxuu keenaa gubasho kiimikaad marinka neefsashada. NH₃ ka badan 300 ppm wuxuu noqon karaa mid nafta halis gelin kara.
somali.a_classmate_suggests_cleaning_the_benc: Marka aad wali furan tahay xalka ammonia, arday-la-dhigasho ayaa soo jeedinaya in miiska lagu nadiifiyo bleach.
somali.stop_them_immediately_bleach_ammonia_t: Isla markiiba jooji! Bleach + ammonia = gaas chloramine sun ah
somali.life_saving_action_naocl_2nh_2nh_cl_ch: Tallaabo naf badbaadin ah! NaOCl + 2NH₃ → 2NH₂Cl (chloramine) — gaas sun ah oo keena dhaawac neefsasho oo daran. Kani waa mid ka mid ah isku-darka lama filaanka ah ee ugu khatarta badan shaybaadhka. Had iyo jeer dhexdhexaadi oo tuur dhammaan kiimikooyinka ka hor isticmaalka xal nadiifin kasta.
somali.sure_bleach_is_a_disinfectant_it_shoul: Hubaal, bleach waa jeermis-dile, waa inuu fiicnaadaa
somali.extremely_dangerous_mixing_bleach_naoc: Khatar aad u weyn! Isku-darka bleach (NaOCl) iyo ammonia waxay soo saartaa gaas chloramine sun ah. Waxay keentay dhimasho shaybaadhyada iyo guryaha. Waligaa bleach ha ku darin kiimikaad kale.
somali.it_should_be_fine_if_the_ammonia_is_di: Waa inuu fiicnaadaa haddii ammonia uu khafiif yahay
somali.wrong_even_dilute_ammonia_reacts_with_: Qalad! Xitaa ammonia khafiifka ah wuxuu la falgalaa bleach si uu u soo saaro gaas chloramine sun ah. Falcelinta waxay dhacdaa tiro kasta. Ma jiro khafiifin ammaan ah oo lagu darsado kiimikooyinkan.
somali.just_open_a_window_and_it_will_be_fine: Kaliya fur daaqad wayna fiicnaan doontaa
somali.ventilation_does_not_make_it_safe_to_g: Hawo-mareenku kama dhigo mid ammaan ah in la soo saaro gaas sun ah! Chloramine wuxuu keenaa dhibaato neefsasho isla markiiba. Ka-hortagga ayaa ah habka kaliya ee la aqbali karo.
somali.delivers_precise_volumes_of_titrant: Waxay bixisaa mugga saxda ah ee titrant.
somali.holds_the_analyte_solution_being_titra: Waxay heshaa xalka analyte ee titration lagu sameeyo.
somali.measures_exact_volumes_of_analyte: Waxay cabbirtaa mugga saxda ah ee analyte.
somali.changes_color_to_signal_the_endpoint: Waxay beddeshaa midabka si ay u tilmaanto dhibcaha dhammaadka.
somali.contains_distilled_water_for_rinsing: Waxay ku jirtaa biyo la miiray oo loogu talagalay dhaqista.
somali.all_three_are_mandatory_goggles_protec: Saddexdaba waa waajib: muraayadaha waxay indhaha ka ilaaliyaan saydhitaanka, galoofisyada gacmaha ka ilaaliyaan waxyaabaha nabarka geliya, koodhkuna dharka iyo maqaarka ilaaliyaa.
somali.water_first_always_the_15_minute_rinse: Biyo marka hore had iyo jeer! Dhaqista 15 daqiiqo waa muhiim. Dhexdhexaadiyayaashu waxay maqaarka ku keeni karaan falcelin kulayl sii deyn.
somali.the_equivalence_point_is_the_stoichiom: Dhibcaha sinnaanta waa dhibcaha stoichiometric. pH sinnaanta ku xiran tahay xoogga aashitada/baseska — waa pH 7 kaliya aashito xoog leh + base xoog leh.
somali.the_exothermic_reaction_can_cause_viol: Falcelinta kulaylka sii deynaysa waxay keeni kartaa karkarin daran iyo saydhitaan
somali.when_water_hits_concentrated_acid_the_: Marka biyo ku dhaco aashito xoogan, kulaylka la sii daayo wuxuu biyaha isla markiiba karkarin karaa, isagoo keena saydhitaan daran oo aashito kulul ah. Ku darista aashitada biyaha waxay kulaylka ku qaybisaa mugga biyaha oo weyn.
somali.at_equivalence_only_the_conjugate_base: Sinnaanta, kaliya base conjugate (A⁻) ayaa hadha. Base conjugate ee aashitada daciifka ah laftiisu waa base daciif ah, kaas oo xalka ka dhigaya base (pH > 7).
somali.strong_acid_strong_base_or_weak_acid_s: Aashito xoog leh + base xoog leh ama aashito daciif + base xoog leh
somali.phenolphthalein_transitions_at_ph_8_2_: Phenolphthalein wuxuu isbeddelaa pH 8.2-10.0 taas oo u dhiganta pH sinnaanta base ee titration aashito daciif + base xoog leh. Wuxuu kaloo u shaqeeyaa aashito xoog leh+base xoog leh sababtoo ah booddu waxay dhaaftaa kala duwanaanshahiisa.
somali.bleach_ammonia_chloramine_gas_toxic_bl: Bleach + ammonia = gaas chloramine (sun). Bleach + aashito = gaas chlorine (sun). Labaduba waxay keeni karaan dhaawac neefsasho oo daran ama dhimasho. Waligaa bleach ha ku darin kiimikaad.
somali.23_45_has_4_significant_figures_the_la: 23.45 wuxuu leeyahay 4 tiro muhiim ah. Tirada ugu dambeysa (5) waxaa lagu qiyaasay inta u dhaxaysa calaamadaha. Biuret-yadu waa sax ilaa ±0.05 ml.
somali.at_half_equivalence_ha_a_so_henderson_: Kala-badhka sinnaanta [HA] = [A⁻] sidaas darteed Henderson–Hasselbalch wuxuu bixiyaa pH = pKa + log(1) = pKa. Kani waa bartamaha aagga buffer.
somali.when_handling_1m_concentrated_acids_or: Marka la maareynayo aashitooyin ama baseska xoogan >1M
somali.face_shields_provide_splash_protection: Gaashaanka wejigu waxay bixiyaan ilaalin saydhitaan wejiga oo dhan. Waxaa loo baahan yahay waxyaabaha nabarka geliya ee xoogan (>1M), kululaynta, iyo hab kasta oo leh khatar saydhitaan ka baxsan aagga isha.
somali.naoh_causes_alkali_burns_that_penetrat: NaOH wuxuu keenaa gubasho alkali oo isha gasha 10 ilbiriqsi gudahood. La'aanta muraayadaha, hal saydhitaan wuxuu keeni karaa lumis aragti oo joogto ah.
somali.concentrated_hcl_dissolves_skin_on_con: HCl xoogan wuxuu maqaarka milmaa isla marka uu taabto. Xitaa aashitooyinka khafiifka ah waxay keenaan cadho. Gacmahaagu waxay ugu dhow yihiin kiimikooyinka.
somali.a_splash_of_acid_or_base_will_burn_thr: Saydhitaan aashito ama base ah wuxuu gubi doonaa dharka iyo maqaarka. Koodhku wuxuu bixiyaa lakab caqabad ah oo la saari karo.
somali.a_dropped_beaker_sends_glass_and_chemi: Beaker dhacay wuxuu quraarad iyo kiimikooyin ku firdhiya dhulka oo dhan. Kabo faraha lugta furan macnaheedu waa aashito lugaha qaawan.
somali.all_safety_protocols_confirmed: Dhammaan hababka badbaadada waa la xaqiijiyay
somali.equip_each_piece_of_ppe_before_proceed: Xidho qayb kasta oo qalabka ilaalinta ah ka hor inta aadan sii wadin. Shaybaadhka dhabta ah, ma taaban kartid kiimikooyinka adiga oo aan lahayn ilaalin buuxda.
somali.find_each_piece_of_safety_equipment_on: Hel qayb kasta oo qalabka badbaadada ah khariidada shaybaadhka. Xaalad degdeg ah oo dhab ah, ilbiriqsiyadu waa muhiim — waa inaad ogaataa meesha wax walba yaalaan ka hor inta aadan bilaabin.
somali.eyewash_station_located_2: 🚿 Xarunta dhaqista isha waa la helay!
somali.the_10_second_rule_if_chemicals_splash: Xeerka 10-ilbiriqsi: haddii kiimikaad ku saydho indhahaaga, waxaad haysataa qiyaastii 10 ilbiriqsi si aad u gaadho xarunta dhaqista isha ka hor inta uusan bilaaban dhaawaca joogtada ah. Indhaha furan hayso oo dhaq 15+ daqiiqo.
somali.remember_p_a_s_s_pull_the_pin_aim_at_b: Xasuuso P.A.S.S.: Pull (Jiid biinka), Aim (U hagaaji saldhigga dabka), Squeeze (Riix qabashada), Sweep (Ka fayd dhinac ilaa dhinaca kale). Aashitada acetic iyo qaar ka mid ah dareerayaasha way ololayaan — ogow meeshan ka hor inta aadan bilaabin.
somali.safety_data_sheets_located: 📋 Warqadaha macluumaadka badbaadada waa la helay!
somali.sds_documents_list_all_hazards_require: Dokumentiyada SDS waxay liistaan dhammaan khataraha, qalabka ilaalinta loo baahan yahay, tallaabooyinka gargaarka koowaad, iyo xiriirrada degdegga ah ee kiimikaad kasta oo shaybaadhka ku jira. Baar iyaga ka hor inta aadan maareyn kiimikaad kasta.
somali.you_can_now_locate_all_emergency_equip: Hadda waxaad ka heli kartaa dhammaan qalabka degdegga ah miiskaaga. Xaalad degdeg ah, ilbiriqsi kastaa waa muhiim — aqoontan waxay badbaadin kartaa naf.
somali.review_every_chemical_you_will_handle_: Dib u eeg kiimikaad kasta oo aad maanta maareyn doonto. Taabo kaadh kasta si aad u aqoonsato inaad fahamto khatarta.
somali.tap_to_acknowledge_you_ve_reviewed_thi: ☝ Taabo si aad u aqoonsato inaad dib u eegtay kiimikaadkan
somali.enter_lab_safety_confirmed: Gal shaybaadhka — Badbaadada waa la xaqiijiyay
somali.lab_safety_confirmed_enter_virtual_lab: 🧪 Badbaadada shaybaadhka waa la xaqiijiyay — Gal shaybaadh farsamo
somali.titration_lab_keyboard_shortcuts_1_thr: Shaybaadhka titration. Gaaban-hababka kiiboodhka: 1 ilaa 5 beddel tab.
somali.ppe_active_lab_safety_verified: Qalabka ilaalinta waa firfircoon • Badbaadada shaybaadhka waa la xaqiijiyay
somali.eyewash_10_second_rule_fire_extinguish: 🚿 Dhaqista isha: xeerka 10-ilbiriqsi • 🧯 Dab-demiska waa la helay • 📋 SDS waa la baaray
somali.add_titrant_drop_by_drop_until_indicat: Ku dar titrant dhibic-dhibic ilaa tilmaamuhu beddelo midabka. Dhibcaha sinnaanta = dheelitir stoichiometric; dhibcaha dhammaadka = halka tilmaamuhu beddelayo. Had iyo jeer isku mid maaha.
somali.match_real_world_unknowns_by_titrating: U dhig waxyaabaha aan la garanayn ee adduunka dhabta ah adigoo titration u samaynaya ilaa ±0.05 ml qiimaha aragtiyeed. La soco saxnaanta + xawaaraha; qiimeynta waxay la mid tahay AP Chem.
somali.burette_explodes_acid_burns_spill_indi: Biuret wuu qarxaa, daadin gubasho aashito, tilmaame si degdeg ah loo daray. Ku tababaro isku-xigxiga jawaab-celinta saxda ah ka hor inta uu muhiim ka noqon shaybaadhka dhabta ah.
somali.burette_tolerance_0_05_ml_volumetric_f: Dul-qaadka biuret 0.05 ml; flask mugga 0.10 ml; pipette 0.02 ml. Fasalka saxnaanta A ee ka soo horjeeda B wuxuu labanlaabaa qaladka. Habaynta ayaa muhiim ka ah sida ardaydu u malaynayaan.
somali.stock_diluent_desired_concentration_th: Kayd + khafiifiye → tirada la rabo. 4-ta dhibaato ee AP Chem ee ugu badan la tijaabiyo waxay ku soo dhacaan isla'eg keliya kan. La soco tirooyinka muhiimka ah: cabbirka ugu daciifsan ayaa go'aamiya jawaabta.
somali.buffer_discovery_when_does_a_buffer_ho: Ogaanshaha buffer — Goorma ayaa buffer sii jira?
somali.adjust_acid_strength_a_ha_ratio_starti: Hagaaji xoogga aashitada, saamiga [A⁻]/[HA], iyo pH bilowga. Natiijadu way kala duwan tahay: buffer wanaagsan ama buffer xun (ka dib ku darista aashito dheeraad ah 20%). Ma jiro qiimo, ma jiro daahfur — kaliya baaris iyo indho-indhayn.
somali.the_trace_shows_relative_reaction_prog: Xariiqdu waxay muujineysaa horumarka falcelinta isbarbardhig, maaha pH — halkan ma jiro mitir pH. Dhibcaha dhammaadka waa midabka casaanka fuqaa ee ugu horreeya ee sii jira xad-dhaaf yar oo MnO₄⁻ ah (waxay falcelisaa guduudan → midab la'aan ilaa waqtigaas). Akhri dhibcahan dhammaadka midabka.
somali.reset_titration_volume_to_zero: Dib u dejin mugga titration ilaa eber
somali.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base_the_: — halka moles aashito = moles base. pH dhibcahan wuxuu ku xiran yahay xoogga aashitada/baseska.
somali.where_the_indicator_changes_color_idea: — halka tilmaamuhu beddelayo midabka. Si fiican loo doortay si dhibcaha dhammaadka ≈ dhibcaha sinnaanta.
somali.the_flat_part_of_a_weak_acid_base_curv: — qaybta simman ee qalooca aashito/base daciif ah halka pH uu iska caabiyo isbeddelka (Henderson–Hasselbalch waa shaqeeya).
somali.weak_acids_bases_that_change_color_at_: — aashitooyin/baseska daciifka ah oo beddela midabka kala-duwanaanshaha pH gaarka ah. Dooro mid kala-duwanaanshaha isbeddelka uu ku jiro pH sinnaanta.
somali.lab_safety_best_practices: ⚠️ Hababka ugu wanaagsan ee badbaadada shaybaadhka
somali.acid_spill_neutralize_with_sodium_bica: — Daadinta aashitada: ku dhexdhexaadi sodium bicarbonate, ka dibna dhaq. Daadinta baseska: ku dhexdhexaadi aashito citric khafiif ah. Had iyo jeer uga digo dadka kale ee shaybaadhka.
somali.never_mix_bleach_with_ammonia_toxic_ch: — Waligaa bleach ha ku darin ammonia (gaas chloramine sun ah). Waligaa biyo ha ku darin aashito xoogan (khatar saydhitaan kulayl sii deyn — had iyo jeer ku dar aashitada biyaha).
somali.rinse_the_burette_with_the_titrant_sol: — Ku dhaq biuret xalka titrant ka hor buuxinta. Si tartiib ah u ruq ka dib mid kasta oo la daray. Akhri biuret dhinaca hoose ee meniscus.
somali.neutralized_acid_base_solutions_ph_6_8: — Xalka aashito/base ee la dhexdhexaadiyay (pH 6–8) waxaa lagu shubi karaa biyo-mareenka biyo badan. Xalka xoogan baar siyaasadda qashinka kiimikaad ee machadkaaga.
somali.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: Adigoo isticmaalaya erayo fudud oo maalinle ah iyo jumlado gaagaaban
somali.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: Arday fasalka 5, si kooban oo saaxiibtinimo ah
somali.for_a_high_school_chemistry_student_ac: Arday kimistari dugsi sare, sax laakiin la fahmi karo
somali.click_explain_to_have_the_ai_tutor_des: Guji «Sharax» si macallinka AI uu ugu sharaxo titration-kan heerka akhriska aad dooratay.
somali.practice_responding_to_real_lab_emerge: Ku tababaro ka jawaabista xaaladaha degdegga ah ee shaybaadhka dhabta ah. Dooro jawaabta saxda ah xaalad kasta. Tababarradan waxay badbaadin karaan naftaada shaybaadhka dhabta ah!
somali.lab_equipment_proper_technique: 🔬 Qalabka shaybaadhka iyo farsamada saxda ah
somali.master_the_correct_technique_for_each_: Ku takhasus farsamada saxda ah qalab kasta. Farsamo wanaagsan = natiijooyin sax ah + shaqo shaybaadh ammaan ah.
somali.c_v_c_v_calculate_how_to_dilute_a_stoc: C₁V₁ = C₂V₂ — xisaabi sida loo khafiifiyo xalka kaydka ilaa tirada bartilmaameedka.
somali.always_add_acid_to_water_never_water_t: Had iyo jeer ku dar aashitada biyaha, waligaa biyaha aashitada ha ku darin. Isku-darku wuxuu kulayl sii daayaa wuxuuna keeni karaa karkarin daran iyo saydhitaan aashito xoogan.
somali.add_the_stock_solution_to_the_water_ne: Ku dar xalka kaydka biyaha (waligaa biyaha aashitada ha ku darin!)
somali.stopper_and_invert_10_times_to_mix_tho: Xidho oo rog 10 jeer si aad si fiican u isku qasto
somali.strong_acid_strong_base_ph_meter_shows: Aashito xoog leh + base xoog leh · Mitir pH wuxuu muujinayaa boodid
somali.three_sliders_weak_acid_strength_ka_bu: Saddex slider: xoogga aashitada daciifka ah (Ka), saamiga buffer [A⁻]/[HA], iyo pH bilowga. Jaan-goyntu waxay kuu sheegaysaa haddii buffer sii jiro ama uu guuldareysto ka dib ku darista aashito dheeraad ah 20% (natiijo kala duwan — ma jiro «qiimo buffer» tiro ah). Dhaqaaji sliders. Diiwaangeli indho-indhayntaada. Qor waxaad ka ogaatay waxa ka dhigaya buffer mid wanaagsan.
somali.your_hypothesis_free_text_no_right_ans: Mala-awaalkaaga (qoraal xor ah — ma jiro jawaab sax ah):
somali.what_single_condition_makes_the_differ: Xaalad kaliya oo kee ah ayaa kala saartaa wanaagsan iyo xun? Saamiga ma ka muhiimsan yahay pKa? pH bilowga ma muhiim baa gebi ahaanba? Qor aragtidaada gaarka ah.
somali.i_m_stuck_show_me_questions_to_think_a: 🤔 Waan istaagay — i tus su'aalo aan ka fikiro (jawaabo ma jiraan)
somali.fix_ratio_at_1_0_sweep_pka_from_2_to_1: Ku hagaaji saamiga 1.0. Ka mari pKa 2 ilaa 12. Qiimayaal pKa qaar ma buffer ka wanaagsan yihiin dabiici ahaan? Maxay sidaas u noqon kartaa?
somali.set_pka_4_74_acetic_acid_sweep_ratio_f: Deji pKa = 4.74 (aashito acetic). Ka mari saamiga 0.05 ilaa 20. Saamiyada kee ayuu buffer ku sii jiraa? Ma jiraa «sanduuq wanaagsan» is-simid ah oo saamiga ku jira?
somali.find_one_good_buffer_then_change_one_s: Hel hal buffer wanaagsan. Ka dibna beddel hal slider ilaa uu noqdo mid xun. Isbeddel kaliya oo kee ah ayaa ugu waxtar badan?
somali.log_4_5_good_buffers_with_different_pk: Diiwaangeli 4-5 buffer wanaagsan oo leh qiimayaal pKa kala duwan. Maxay pH bilowgooda ku wadaagaan pKa-gooda?
somali.in_real_biochemistry_blood_is_buffered: Biochemistry dhabta ah, dhiigga waxaa loo buffer sameeyaa pH 7.4 — pKa kee ayaa ugu habboon nidaamka buffer-kaas? Baar adigoo raadinaya buffer phosphate iyo bicarbonate.
somali.no_answers_will_be_revealed_investigat: Ma jiri doonto jawaab la muujiyo. Baar.
somali.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs_le: Waxaan u malaynayaa inaan fahmay is-dhaafsiga — i sii daa aan ku sharaxo erayadayda gaarka ah
somali.explain_in_your_own_words_what_is_the_: Ku sharax erayadaada gaarka ah: waa maxay xiriirka u dhexeeya pKa, saamiga, iyo pH bilowga? Xaalad kaliya oo kee ah (ama isku-dar) ayaa buffer ka dhigaya mid u adkeysta aashito badan? Maxay kala-duwanaanshaha saamigu muhiim u yahay?
somali.saved_notice_nobody_checked_your_answe: ✓ Waa la kaydiyay. Xusuusin — qofna ma eegin jawaabtaada. Kani waa dabeecadda baarista uu ardaygu hoggaamiyo.
somali.design_note_no_buffer_capacity_score_n: Xusuusin naqshadeed: ma jiro qiimo awoodda buffer, ma jiro badhan daahfur, ma jiro hubin imtixaan. Natiijada waxaa loo muujiyaa 2 xaaladood oo kala duwan (wanaagsan / xun) halkii laga heli lahaa qiime joogto ah — si ula kac ah, si loo yareeyo dabeecadda hagaajinta. Wax muhiimka ah waa baarista, maaha tiro.
